title: Vegan Fermented Tender Bryndza Cheese Stir-fry
description: A quick and easy vegan weeknight Filipino dish featuring tender bryndza cheese in a flavorful stir-fry sauce.

ingredients.name: Vegan bryndza cheese
ingredients.notes: For texture and taste, use vegan bryndza or a blend of other plant-based cheeses like shiitake jackfruit, avocado, or cashew cheddar.

ingredients.name: Baby bok choy
ingredients.notes: Wash thoroughly to remove any dirt.

ingredients.name: Shrimp paste (amami-kakeko)
ingredients.notes: Use vegan or soy-free alternative if necessary.

ingredients.name: Tamari sauce
ingredients.notes: Vegan tamari as a gluten-free substitute.

ingredients.name: Soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Vegan soy sauce for depth of flavor.

instructions: Preheat your wok or pan to high heat. Drizzle with vegetable oil.
Add chopped baby bok choy, green onions, and garlic cloves to the pan. Sauté until tender but still crisp, about 2 minutes.
Reduce heat to medium-high and stir in vegan bryndza cheese, Tamari sauce, soy sauce, and shrimp paste. Stir well until cheese is melted and mixture starts to simmer.
Add more oil if needed and continue to stir-fry until the mixture is heated through and cheese becomes tender and golden brown on top.
Serve hot with steamed jasmine rice or noodles for a complete meal.
